core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine ancient manuscript aesthetics with modern minimalist SaaS patterns.
Emotion First: The UI should evoke calmness and reverence. Use generous negative space and warm, grounding colors.
Typography: Use a classic, elegant Serif (Cormorant Garamond) for scriptures and headings to create a sense of profoundness. Use Manrope for UI and functional text.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. Standard container padding: p-6 to p-12. Section gaps: py-20 to py-32.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for cards and images. rounded-full for primary buttons.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: MODE B (The Control Room Grid) for Dashboard, mixed with MODE A (The Tetris Grid) for Marketing/Landing.

cards.style: Flat Solid. bg-white border border-[#E8E3D9] shadow-sm. Inner padding p-6 or p-8.

header.style: Crystal Glass. bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E8E3D9] z-50 sticky top-0.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D97757] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-[#C16648] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D97757] focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#E8E3D9] text-[#2C2A29] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-[#F5F2EA] transition-colors

search_bar.style: Large, prominent, rounded-full border border-[#E8E3D9] bg-white px-6 py-4 shadow-sm focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-[#D97757] focus-within:border-transparent transition-all.

media.hero_overlay: bg-black/30 (if using dark text over it, use gradient overlay to ensure contrast, or keep image as a side graphic)

feature_images.description: Lotus flower for Daily Verse / Meditation sections
Ancient manuscript for Browse Texts section

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, size 20px or 24px for standard UI, larger for feature cards.

interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out' for smooth feeling.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text against background meets APCA/WCAG standards. Use deep charcoal (#2C2A29) for body text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, quote cards) MUST have a descriptive data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Set up Tailwind config with the specified colors, fonts, and border radii. Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.html. 2. Build a full-stack Hybrid app containing a Landing Page and an App Dashboard. 3. Landing page: Should have a serene hero section (using the temple silhouette image) introducing the AI semantic search for Hindu texts. 4. App Dashboard: Provide a sidebar or top nav with routes for 'Home/Daily Verse', 'AI Search', 'Browse Texts' (Ramayana, Gita, Devi Mahatmyam), and 'Saved Quotes'. 5. 'Search' should look prominent and magical (AI-powered). 6. Use Cormorant Garamond heavily for the actual scripture text display to give it a timeless feel, and Manrope for standard UI elements. 7. Do not forget 'data-testid' on interactive elements. 8. Avoid clutter; use p-8 to p-12 paddings within cards to let text breathe.
